basic_details.job_title: DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai has released the official notification for Para Legal Volunteer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 750/- per day (only on assigned special days)
salary_details.details: Rs. 750/- per day (only on assigned special days).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://begusarai.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
